book.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.summary: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

book.title: IT
book.author: Stephen King
book.summary: A novel about a group of children who face a supernatural entity in their small town.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.summary: A novel about racial injustice in the Deep South, seen through the eyes of a young girl.
